---
title: ""
page-layout: full
---

<div id="site-header">
<h1>Dog Capital</h1>
<p>Systematic strategies for Argentine investors</p>
</div>

<div style="padding: 4rem 0 2rem 0; color: #888; font-size: 0.9rem;">
Coming soon.
</div>

<div id="site-footer">
&copy; 2026 Dog Capital &nbsp;&middot;&nbsp; Buenos Aires
</div>
